title: Scheduler — two recurring jobs from one alarm

vars.spec: Build a Durable Object named `Scheduler` on Cloudflare Workers that runs two independent recurring jobs from a single instance: a heartbeat every 5 minutes and a session-expiry sweep every 30 minutes. Both schedules must survive hibernation and eviction. Expose POST /start to begin scheduling and GET /status to report when each job last ran and is next due. Persist all schedule state in Durable Object storage.

note: Single input: a plain-language Durable Object spec. The runbook turns it into a production DO + wrangler config + self-review.
